landing.hero_desc: Navigate the complexity of Indian elections with clarity. 100% Free. 100% Privacy-First. Open-Source for the People.
landing.evm_desc: Practice your vote on a high-fidelity replica of the Indian voting machine.
landing.affidavit_desc: AI-powered summaries of candidate filings. Know who you are voting for.
landing.booth_desc: Real-time queue updates and precise directions to your polling station.

readiness.title: Are you ready to vote?
readiness.desc: Before heading to the booth, ensure you are eligible and have the correct documentation.

learn.title: Knowledge is
learn.desc: Understand your candidates, verify information, and master the voting process in our interactive learning hub.
learn.why_p1: The Electronic Voting Machine (EVM) and Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail (VVPAT) are the backbones of Indian democracy. For first-time voters, the process can be intimidating.
learn.why_p2: By practicing in this sandbox, you learn:
learn.why_l1: How the control unit and ballot unit interact.
learn.why_l2: How to verify your choice on the VVPAT screen.
learn.why_l3: The meaning of different lights and sound signals.
learn.why_l4: How to ensure your vote is cast successfully.
learn.privacy_desc: Remember: Your vote is secret. No one — not even the polling officers — should see who you vote for. This simulator does not record any of your choices.

quiz.q1_desc: You must be at least 18 years old on the qualifying date to vote in Indian elections.
quiz.q2_title: Are you a citizen of India?
quiz.q2_desc: Only citizens of India are eligible to register as voters.
quiz.q3_title: Are you registered as a voter?
quiz.q3_desc: Check if your name is on the official electoral roll for your constituency.
quiz.result_eligible_body: You are eligible and registered. Get ready to make your voice heard on election day!
quiz.result_partial_body: You are eligible to vote, but you need to register first.
quiz.result_ineligible_body: You currently do not meet the eligibility criteria for voting in India.

checklist.title: Document Checklist
checklist.desc: Select the documents you have ready for election day.
checklist.lost_id_desc: Our triage system can help you find alternatives.
